personality_one_liner: Cinematic, expensive, and restrained Apple-inspired luxury with deep depth and tactile glass surfaces.

spacing.rule: Generous Apple-like margins (16-24pt). Content breathes. Use flex gaps and avoid tight bounding boxes.

do_s: Use on sticky headers, bottom tab bar, bottom sheet headers
Use on featured/hero cards over brand-tinted or photo backdrops
Apply translucent tinted base beneath the blur (≥70% of surface) to guarantee text readability
dont_s: Do not apply glass to list rows, form inputs, or standard body content
Do not use blur without a tint underneath it

screens.name: Auth (Login & Registration)
screens.purpose: A cinematic entry point reflecting the luxury brand.

states.loading: Subtle activity indicator over a blurred background.
states.error: Elegant toast with dark ruby/error background.

screens.layout: Full-bleed background image with a top-down gradient scrim. The login container is a glassmorphic sheet anchored at the bottom 40% with Cormorant Garamond headings and elegant text inputs.

screens.name: Super Admin & Owner Dashboard
screens.purpose: High-level overview of revenue, quick actions, and insights.

states.loading: Skeleton loaders matching the radius of metric cards.
states.empty: No data available with a refined illustrative SVG.
states.error: Error loading metrics with retry button.

screens.layout: Header has large typography (Satoshi weight 500). Key metrics in a horizontal scroll of glass cards with subtle antique gold tint. Quick actions in a 2-column grid. Generous vertical spacing.

screens.name: Waiter Split-Screen Ordering
screens.purpose: Fast, error-free order entry with simultaneous menu browsing.

states.empty: Order basket is empty (display 'No items added' with elegant icon).

screens.layout: Vertical split on portrait (tablet/mobile). Top 35% is the active order basket (solid surfaceSecondary with strict boundaries, swipe-to-delete rows). Bottom 65% is the menu: segmented control for categories (glass pinned at top of menu), 2-column grid for items. Items are text/icon focused with massive touch targets. Add a persistent sticky 'Send to Kitchen' primary CTA at the absolute bottom.

screens.name: Kitchen Display System (KDS)
screens.purpose: High-visibility, action-oriented ticket management for kitchen staff.

states.empty: Clean screen with 'All Caught Up' message and a large checkmark icon.
states.error: Loud, unmissable offline banner across the top.

screens.layout: Adaptive grid of ticket cards (single column on mobile, multi-column on tablet). The entire ticket acts as a touch target to 'Bump'. Use display-size typography. States shift ticket background heavily: fresh (surfaceSecondary) -> warning (warning tint) -> late (error tint) for peripheral readability. No glassmorphism here for maximum contrast.

screens.name: Billing & Checkout
screens.purpose: Finalize payment with dynamic UPI QR and print options.
screens.layout: Centered receipt view resembling thermal print structure but elevated. Large Dynamic UPI QR code prominently displayed in a surfaceSecondary card. Sticky bottom actions for 'Print Thermal', 'Share PDF', and 'Mark Paid'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Glass / Luxe aesthetic: deep darks, translucent surfaces over tinted bases, and single jewel-tone accent (Antique Gold).

For the Waiter Ordering screen: Follow the vertical split-screen layout strictly. Active order on top (35% height), scrollable menu grid on the bottom. Add swipe-to-delete gestures on the order items.
For KDS: Prioritize high-contrast, large typography, and massive touch targets. Forego glassmorphism entirely on this specific screen to ensure arm's length readability.
Ensure all text rendered over images uses a vertical top-to-bottom gradient scrim (transparent to ≥70% surfaceInverse) to guarantee contrast.
Implement dynamic light and dark themes using the provided color tokens. Ensure UI correctly responds to system theme changes.
Keep typography weights at 400 or 500 max. Rely on size for hierarchy (e.g., Cormorant Garamond for prominent display headings, Satoshi for body).
